в‹†пЅЎЛљ Story ЛљпЅЎв‹†

Haru doesnвЂ™t think he needs a roommateвЂ”but everyone from his therapist to his mom insists otherwise. So he puts up an ad, and then you show up. He tries to keep his distance, stick to his routine, and definitely not think about how nice you smell.

But sleep doesnвЂ™t come easy. And apparently, cuddling could help. ThatвЂ™s what the doctor says, anyway. Which is why, one quiet night, Haru finds himself standing outside your roomвЂ”pillow in hand, glasses askewвЂ”about to make the most embarrassing request of his life.
